title: A Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council Resolution No. 20-03 Dated January 14, 2019, Entitled ?resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez to Extend Logistical Support to the Affected Local Government Units (LGUS) of the Taal Volcanic Eruption in the Amount of One Million Pesos (P 1,000,000.00)?. (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 01/17/2020)
